titleStmt.title: SII 7.352: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 352. (A.R. No. 155 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE SOMANATHESVARA TEMPLE AT MANIGARAKERI NEAR BARAKUR, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipataĒ(ṁ) namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi
ścaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbha(ṁ)mūlasthaṁbhā
ya saṁbhavē . svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1301 neya
va¨rttamāna kāḷayuktākṣi saṁvaccharada mā¨rggasira su 1 sōmavā
radaṁdu śrīman®mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvara Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāśegeta
ppuvarāyaragaṁḍa śrīvīrabukkaṁṇnavoḍeyara kumāra śrīma
tu rājādhirāja rājaparamēsvara śrīvīra hariyappavoḍeya
ra vijeyarājyābhyudayadallu śrīman®mahāpradhāna boṁmarasa
voḍeyaru bārakurarājyava nāḷuvallimaṇigārakēriya
voḷagaṇa sōmaIdēvaralli kaviliseṭṭiya rāmaṁṇnaṣeṭiya
heṁḍatti nāgave rudrapujege brāhmaṇa bhōjanakke mūva
riṁge nāgave dēvariṁge koṭṭa ga 30 kke koṁḍu kabūralli dēva
rī mūladi bāḷa Oḷage pratidina 1 kke kaṁccina Akki hā 1 . mē
lubīyakke ḻā 2 tōṭāradaOḷage tō tuppa mēlōgara 3 mosaru
vīḷeya Iṣṭanu naḍasuvaru toḷaśiyamālege koṭṭa ga 4 kā¨rttikamāsada
lli pratidina 1 kke dīpōtsavahaṁnabbada tuppadadīvigege huṁṇaveya
dina paṁcāmrita Upārasikharada dīvige I dha¨rmmake nāgave koṭṭa ga 15 Ā
ṁtu ga 42 vanū koṁḍu I bāḷiṁdalli maṇigāṟakēriya 3 seṭṭikāṟarū sama
sta halarū dēvara śrīkāriyava naḍsuvātanu . I dha¨rmmava naḍasuvaru
dēvara Amrutapaḍi naḍavade I dha¨rma naḍaUdu Ā nāgave koṭṭadu tā
ṁbrada caṟukalu 1 saṭṭuga 1 kuḍiIva taṁbuge 1 dēvariṁgepaṁṇate
1 Iṣṭanū māḍiśi koṭṭaḷu Ivaṟa haṟemuṟeyanu dēvarē māḍisuva
ru.yi dha[¨rmma]kke Āvanāno¨rbba Aḷupidare vāraṇāsiyalli (1)
1,000 kavileya vadhsida dōśadalli hōharu brāhmaṇara
1,000 prajeya vadhsida dōśadalli hōharu . svadattāṁ para
dattāṁ vā yō harētu vasuṁdhara [. 1] śaṣṭi¨rvvaruśa sahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . nāgave dēviyara Oppa śrī .
Digital edition of SII 7.352 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
